faqSection.heading: Questions & answers.
faqSection.lead: Still curious before you book? Our team in Reykjavík is one message away.

items.question: What do I need to rent and drive in Iceland?
items.answer: A full driving licence held for at least one year and a card in the main driver's name. Most vehicles ask that you're 20+, or 23+ for the larger 4×4s. Bring your licence and passport to pickup — that's it.

items.question: Is gravel and ash damage covered?
items.answer: Yes. Gravel protection and sand-and-ash cover are built into every booking, not sold separately at the counter — they're the two things that catch most travellers out on Iceland's roads.

items.question: Where can I sleep in a campervan?
items.answer: At any of Iceland's registered campsites, which line the Ring Road. Wild camping in a vehicle isn't permitted, so we send a campsite map with every van booking to make planning each night easy.

items.question: What if a road closes or the weather turns?
items.answer: Call our Reykjavík team any hour and we'll help you re-route, find a stay, or rethink the plan. Live road and weather alerts are also pinned inside your booking so nothing catches you off guard.

items.question: How does pickup near Keflavík work?
items.answer: Land, hop on the quick shuttle, and collect your keys minutes from the terminal. You'll get a hands-on walkthrough of the vehicle before you drive off, with studded tyres and gear already fitted for the season.

whySection.heading: One local platform for every way to explore Iceland.
whySection.subheading: Campervans, cars, guesthouses — even a way to earn from your own. All checked by a team that actually drives these roads.

featuresLeft.title: Campervans
featuresLeft.description: Sleep where you stop — kitted out for the Ring Road and beyond.
featuresLeft.expandedText: Heaters, gas hobs and proper bedding come as standard, and every van is winter-checked before pickup so you can chase the aurora without packing half a house.

featuresLeft.title: Cars & 4×4s
featuresLeft.description: From city compacts to proper F-road 4×4s with gravel cover.
featuresLeft.expandedText: Need to reach the highlands? Our 4×4s clear the F-roads and river crossings the rental desks at the airport quietly tell you to avoid.

featuresLeft.title: Guesthouses
featuresLeft.description: Warm, vetted beds spaced along your route across the island.
featuresLeft.expandedText: Hand-picked stays in Vík, Höfn, Akureyri and more — each within an easy day's drive of the last, so your itinerary plans itself.

featuresRight.title: Become a host
featuresRight.description: List your van or guesthouse and earn between trips, hassle-free.
featuresRight.expandedText: We handle bookings, payments and insurance, and you keep the calendar. Most hosts cover their winter storage within the first season.

featuresRight.title: Fully insured
featuresRight.description: Gravel, ash and tyre protection bundled into one clear price.
featuresRight.expandedText: Iceland's gravel and volcanic ash wreck more rentals than anything else — so that cover is included up front, not upsold at the counter.

featuresRight.title: Local support, 24/7
featuresRight.description: Real people in Reykjavík, any season, whenever the road turns.
featuresRight.expandedText: Flat tyre at midnight, a road closed by weather, a route rethink — one call reaches a local who knows exactly where you are and what to do.

steps.description: Hit the Ring Road with unlimited mileage and 24/7 local support in your pocket. Anything comes up — weather, a flat, a route change — and a real person in Iceland picks up.

hero.title: About MyTerraBook
hero.lead: Iceland's locally-run platform for campervans, cars, 4×4s and guesthouses — one booking, one team in Reykjavík behind it.

storySection.heading: Built for travellers who want the whole island, not just a rental counter.

about.body:
MyTerraBook started with a simple idea: travellers should be able to plan an entire Iceland trip in one place, with real people on the other end of the phone when the weather turns.

We are a Reykjavík-based team working with trusted local hosts and fleet partners across the island. Every listing is hand-checked, every price is transparent, and every booking comes with gravel protection, local support, and clear cancellation terms.

Whether you are driving the Ring Road in a campervan, adding a 4×4 for the highlands, or booking a guesthouse between adventures, we are here to make it straightforward.

valuesSection.heading: Local expertise, transparent bookings, support when the weather turns.

offeringsSection.heading: Everything you need for the Ring Road — and the roads off it.

cta.title: Planning a trip? We're in Reykjavík when you need us.

hero.title: Terms & conditions
hero.lead: Rental and stay terms for bookings made through MyTerraBook.

terms.body:
1. Bookings

By completing a booking on MyTerraBook you enter into an agreement with the listed host or fleet partner, facilitated by MyTerraBook ehf. Prices shown include mandatory insurance bundles unless stated otherwise.

2. Driver requirements

All drivers must hold a valid licence for at least one year and meet the minimum age for the selected vehicle category. Additional drivers must be declared before pickup.

3. Cancellations

Free cancellation up to 48 hours before pickup or check-in applies on most listings unless a stricter policy is shown on the listing page. Late cancellations may incur fees set by the host.

4. Deposits & payments

Security deposits are pre-authorised on your card at pickup or check-in. Final charges are settled according to the booking confirmation and any agreed extras.

5. Liability

Travellers are responsible for fines, tolls, and damage outside covered insurance events. MyTerraBook acts as booking agent unless otherwise stated on your confirmation.

hero.title: Privacy policy
hero.lead: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

privacy.body:
Data we collect

We collect information you provide when creating an account, making a booking, or contacting support — including name, email, phone, payment details, and travel dates.

How we use it

Your data is used to process bookings, communicate about your trip, prevent fraud, and improve our services. We share necessary details with hosts and payment providers to fulfil your booking.

Retention

We retain booking records as required by Icelandic law and for legitimate business purposes. You may request access or deletion where applicable by emailing support@myterrabook.is.

Cookies

See our cookie policy for details on analytics and preference cookies.

hero.title: Cookie policy
hero.lead: How MyTerraBook uses cookies and similar technologies.

cookies.body:
Essential cookies

Required for sign-in, checkout, and security. These cannot be disabled while using the site.

Analytics cookies

Help us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve search, listings, and content. You can opt out via your browser settings.

Preference cookies

Remember language, currency, and session choices to make return visits smoother.

Managing cookies

Most browsers let you block or delete cookies. Blocking essential cookies may limit booking functionality.

faqItems.question: How much can I actually earn?
faqItems.answer: It depends on what you list and when. Campervan hosts earn €1,900/month on average over the season, and the top earners clear €3,200+. We show you a personalised estimate based on real local demand before you publish.

faqItems.question: What does it cost to list?
faqItems.answer: Listing is completely free. We only take a 15% service fee on confirmed bookings, which covers payments, marketing, insurance and 24/7 support. No subscriptions, no upfront costs, no surprises.

faqItems.question: Is my vehicle or property insured?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Every booking is covered by comprehensive insurance including Iceland-specific gravel, sand and ash protection. Guests are identity-verified before pickup, and our team is on call around the clock if anything comes up.

faqItems.question: How and when do I get paid?
faqItems.answer: Payouts are sent to your bank account within 24 hours of each trip starting. You'll see every booking, payout and upcoming reservation in a single earnings dashboard, so you always know what's coming in.

faqItems.question: Do I have to accept every booking?
faqItems.answer: Never. You control your own calendar and can block any dates you need the vehicle or room for yourself. Turn on instant booking for convenience, or review each request by hand — it's entirely up to you.

bookingSteps.title: Choose your dates & send a request
bookingSteps.text: Pick your pick-up and drop-off dates and add any extras. Sending a request doesn't charge your card yet.

bookingSteps.title: The host confirms availability
bookingSteps.text: Your host reviews your trip and approves it — usually within an hour. You'll get a message and email the moment it's accepted.

bookingSteps.title: Pay securely & get confirmed
bookingSteps.text: Once approved, pay in full or in instalments via our trusted payment provider. Your insurance and deposit terms are locked in.

bookingSteps.title: Pick up & hit the Ring Road
bookingSteps.text: Meet your host for a full walkthrough of every system, then you're off. Support is a call away the whole trip.
